sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106146" key="u(a/lios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑάλιος</orth>, <sense id="n106146.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πολέμιος</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author></bibl>, as etym. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ἐνυάλιος.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
